title: Pillowy Malty Ethiopian Mixed Grain Gored Gored
description: A hearty and comforting Ethiopian dish featuring mixed grains and a malty flavor, wrapped in a traditional corn husk

ingredients.name: mixed grains
ingredients.notes: such as teff, barley, and wheat

instructions: Rinse the mixed grains and soak them in water for at least 4 hours
Drain and rinse the grains, then cook them in a bain-marie with 2 cups of water until they are tender
In a separate pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat and saute the onion, garlic, and ginger until softened
Add the malt syrup, berbere spice, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir to combine
Combine the cooked grains and the malt syrup mixture, stirring to combine
Lay a corn husk flat and place a portion of the grain mixture in the center
Fold the corn husk over the filling to form a triangle or square shape, and repeat with the remaining ingredients
Steam the wrapped gored gored over boiling water for 10-15 minutes, or until the corn husks are tender
Serve the gored gored hot, with a side of your favorite Ethiopian dishes
